meta.title: Understanding Our Adversaries: Using Threat Intelligence To Protect Energy Infrastructure
meta.description:
Jason Nations, from an electric utility, and Selena Larson, from a vendor that provides and ICS threat feed, talk about the challenges and path to progress in understanding our adversaries. And more importantly how to use this understanding in a security program and a risk management program.

At 20:40 Jason describes his company's current approach to threat intelligence.

At 27:20 Jason and Selena go over a realistic, but fictionalized, event that occurs and how threat intel plays a role in the response.
